name: Brown Gravy
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Garlic pressed (or 1/2 tsp Garlic powder)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half a cup of warm water and all ingredients except parsley in a blender or food processor.
2. Blend until smooth and creamy.
3. Gradually add another 1-1/2 cups warm water, blending continuously.
4. Pour the mixture into a saucepan and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly.
5. Cook until thick, about 5 minutes.
6. Add parsley flakes for color (if desired).
7. Makes 2 cups.
From "The New Mcdougall Cookbook" by John and Mary McDougall
